name: Democrats.org
subject: If you can't repeal it, sabotage it.
body:
Help us save affordable care.
---
**Add your name if you're still committed to fighting back against the GOP's health care repeal.

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Repeal1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170722_joc_nd&source=em_20170722_joc_nd")**
Derek --

Democrats believe health care is a right. Republicans apparently don't.

That's the only possible reason I can think of for the GOP's latest scheme: openly sabotaging the insurance market.

After failing over and over again to repeal the Affordable Care Act, Donald Trump has said he wants to let Obamacare fail. The only problem is that Obamacare isn't failing -- so Republicans have started undermining it from within.

**[We need to stay vigilant and stop the GOP's attempts to sabotage Obamacare. Stand with Democrats to protect affordable care.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Repeal?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+We+need+to+stay+vigilant+and+stop+the+GO&utm_campaign=em_20170722_joc_nd&source=em_20170722_joc_nd")**

The White House won't say if they'll fund the Affordable Care Act's cost-sharing subsidies. If they don't, premiums will skyrocket across the country and millions of Americans could find their health coverage out of reach.

And just Thursday morning, we learned that the Trump administration has taken taxpayer money intended to help people sign up for health insurance and used it to wage an anti-Obamacare propaganda campaign from within the federal government.

**When it comes to taking our health care away, there's no lengths Republicans won't go to. Democrats are standing up to protect health care for all, but they need your help to keep fighting. If you're with us, say so today:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Repeal1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170722_joc_nd&source=em_20170722_joc_nd")**
Thanks, Derek.

Jess

Jess O'Connell
Chief Executive Officer
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052316a/4067b0a/308d81134/7e6d3528/2465950869/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170722_joc_nd&source=em_20170722_joc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052316a/4067b0a/308d81134/7e6d3529/2465950869/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170722_joc_nd&source=em_20170722_joc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052316a/4067b0a/308d81134/7e6d3536/2465950869/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170722_joc_nd&source=em_20170722_joc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052316a/4067b0a/308d81134/7e6d3537/2465950869/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170722_joc_nd&source=em_20170722_joc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

Republicans apparently don't. That's the only possible reason I can think of for the GOP's latest scheme: openly sabotaging the insurance market. After failing over and over again to repeal the Affordable Care Act, Donald Trump has said he wants to let Obamacare fail. The only problem is that Obamacare isn't failing -- so Republicans have started undermining it from within. Jess Jess O'Connell Chief Executive Officer Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Rep. Darren Jackson
subject: He can't do this alone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202d7a/2fde7c66/452c68f9/15696b32/4099429255/VEsH/ "http://action.ncdp.org/page/s/break-the-majority?utm_campaign=em17_170721_btm3_acq_gq_ful__DJ&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Cooper&source=em17_170721_btm3_acq_gq_ful__DJ&utm_content=1")
---
Friends,

"North Carolina's governor is unveiling an audacious plan to oust his Republican rivals. Democrats hope to make it a national model."

That's from an article in _Politico_ this week. The title asks "Can Roy Cooper Show Democrats How to Win Again?"

The answer is yes he can, but he can't do it alone.

**[Roy Cooper, together with the NC Democratic Party, can lead us -- but we need your help to be truly successful. Sign up now to help Break the Majority.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202d7a/2fde7c66/452c68f9/15696b35/4099429255/VEsE/ "http://action.ncdp.org/page/s/break-the-majority?utm_campaign=em17_170721_btm3_acq_gq_ful__DJ&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Cooper&source=em17_170721_btm3_acq_gq_ful__DJ&utm_content=2+-+Roy+Cooper+together+with+the+NC+Democrat")**

Governor Cooper's experience and his hands-on approach make him the strong leader we need to help break the GOP supermajorities.

As House Democratic Leader, I know just how critical it is that we win back some of these seats.

Now that we've announced Break the Majority, we're focusing on recruiting the best candidates to run -- and we're going to run candidates in every single race. And Governor Cooper will work hard to make sure these candidates have the resources they need to be successful.

**[This is a big job -- we have a lot of work to do. But we can do it if we all buy in and work together. Sign up today.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202d7a/2fde7c66/452c68f9/15696b34/4099429255/VEsF/ "http://action.ncdp.org/page/s/break-the-majority?utm_campaign=em17_170721_btm3_acq_gq_ful__DJ&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Cooper&source=em17_170721_btm3_acq_gq_ful__DJ&utm_content=3+-+This+is+a+big+job++we+have+a+lot+of+work")**

Thanks for your support,

Rep. Darren Jackson
House Democratic Leader
| | [**I'm in ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202d7a/2fde7c66/452c68f9/15696b37/4099429255/VEsC/ "http://action.ncdp.org/page/s/break-the-majority?utm_campaign=em17_170721_btm3_acq_gq_ful__DJ&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Cooper&source=em17_170721_btm3_acq_gq_ful__DJ&utm_content=4+-+Im+in+rarr")
---

* * *

Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
---

Roy Cooper for North Carolina
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602 United States

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

To unsubscribe, go to:
[http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202d7a/2fde7c66/452c68f9/15696b36/4099429255/VEsD/ "http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=5+-+httpactroycoopercomunsubscribe&utm_campaign=em17_170721_btm3_acq_gq_ful__DJ&source=em17_170721_btm3_acq_gq_ful__DJ")

name: DWS
subject: this is beyond ruthless
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Friend, The budget Republicans have brought to the table is an abomination. **In order to finance tax breaks for millionaires and billionaires, Paul Ryan and Republicans are calling for cuts in excess of $200 million to life-saving programs**. Food assistance, Pell Grants, child care subsidies, and the Earned Income Tax Credit will all face the cutting board if Republicans get their way. To summarize: Republicans are gutting programs for the poor, the elderly, and the disabled so they can scratch the backs of their wealthy donors. It's reprehensible. [_**We cannot stand silent. For the millions of struggling families and vulnerable children who would suffer, we must stop this budget. Sign your name in opposition to the ruthless Republican budget.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ed7/622b7b5b/48f5557/307bc10c/921217621/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e170719") The worst part -- these $200 million in cuts is actually what Republicans consider _generous_. **Other proposals go as far as $400 million in cuts.** Programs that literally put food on the table for our most vulnerable neighbors would be slashed and rolled back. [_**The budget championed by Paul Ryan is heartless and cruel. Make your voice heard: stand in opposition of the Republican budget.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ed7/622b7b5b/48f5557/307bc10c/921217621/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e170719") Struggling families can't afford to be forced to pay for a tax cut for billionaires. Thank you, Debbie |
Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ed7/622b7b5b/48f5557/307bc10f/921217621/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe
---

Food assistance, Pell Grants, child care subsidies, and the Earned Income Tax Credit will all face the cutting board if Republicans get their way. To summarize: Republicans are gutting programs for the poor, the elderly, and the disabled so they can scratch the backs of their wealthy donors. It's reprehensible. Programs that literally put food on the table for our most vulnerable neighbors would be slashed and rolled back. name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Gearing up for the Summer for Progress
body:
Right now, we have an opportunity to change the system for the better, but we need your help.
#
Friends,
We all have a vision for what we want this country to become. We can make it a place that guarantees health care, education, and voting rights to all of its people. Our energy system can lead the world in clean, renewable energy production, and people can earn a living wage that does not force them to take on multiple jobs working themselves to the bone. The private prisons, restrictions on women's health care, and illegal behavior on Wall Street can be curtailed and undone, clearing a path for a more just and inclusive society for all.
This is not wishful thinking. It can be done, and so much more.
I got involved in this fight because like you, I saw that the conditions around me, which had persisted over generations of status quo politics, did not have to define the way we lived our lives. Right now, we have an opportunity to change the system for the better, but we need your help if we are going to bring about the radical change we so desperately need. [**Can you contribute $3 to Our Revolution? No matter the size of each individual donation, when we put our resources together we form the most powerful grassroots force this country has ever seen.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/summerofprogress?refcode=em170722-SubA&noskip=true "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/summerofprogress?refcode=em170722-SubA&noskip=true")
Whether you are fighting because you're buried in student loan debt, are struggling to afford your health care, or are one of the millions of Americans who have not bounced back from the Recession quite like Wall Street and the top one percent have, it is important that we stick together.
We have proven time and again that when we are determined, engaged, and supporting one another we can overcome whatever challenge is thrown our way. When the establishment told us that campaigning on Medicare for All, free college tuition, and closing the corporate tax loopholes without a Super PAC to help us was pie in the sky, we went out and won 22 states and over 13 million votes in the Democratic primary. That is exactly what we fought for.
We've also fought against some truly awful policies, from efforts to strip our health care and women's reproductive rights, to racist and xenophobic policies that would discriminate against Latino and Muslim immigrants from living in the land of the free. When things got tough, we stayed the course and prevailed.
Our Revolution is still working to advance the bold, progressive policies that brought us together by lobbying Democrats in the U.S. House to support the #PeoplesPlatform, but we need the resources to compete against the big money interests who are standing in our way. **[Can you chip in just $3 to help us continue the fight for a country that works for all?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/summerofprogress?refcode=em170722-SubA&noskip=true "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/summerofprogress?refcode=em170722-SubA&noskip=true")**
As long as a single person is denied their right to health care, an education, a living wage, or reproductive rights, we will be there fighting. Until the fossil fuel industry, Wall Street, and the prison-industrial complex are called to account for the harm they've done to the American people, we will stand with you in this fight.
We are not just in this movement for ourselves, we are in this movement for generations yet unborn. Thank you for being a part of the political revolution.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
**[DONATE»](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/summerofprogress?refcode=em170722-SubA&noskip=true "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/summerofprogress?refcode=em170722-SubA&noskip=true")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

We've also fought against some truly awful policies, from efforts to strip our health care and women's reproductive rights, to racist and xenophobic policies that would discriminate against Latino and Muslim immigrants from living in the land of the free. When things got tough, we stayed the course and prevailed. Our Revolution is still working to advance the bold, progressive policies that brought us together by lobbying Democrats in the U.S. House to support the #PeoplesPlatform, but we need the resources to compete against the big money interests who are standing in our way. "" As long as a single person is denied their right to health care, an education, a living wage, or reproductive rights, we will be there fighting. Until the fossil fuel industry, Wall Street, and the prison-industrial complex are called to account for the harm they've done to the American people, we will stand with you in this fight. We are not just in this movement for ourselves, we are in this movement for generations yet unborn. Thank you for being a part of the political revolution. In solidarity, Nina Turner President Our Revolution "" PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION 603 2ND ST, NE WASHINGTON, DC, 20002 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity. 603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002

name: Team Kaine
subject: mud slinging
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
**" I'm going to run a very vicious and ruthless campaign" \-- Corey Stewart
[Chip in now to re-elect Tim to the Senate >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=hAag8rGlOA4xfqFTUehgZZir6JtrUBlL)**
Derek,

Throughout Tim's entire career as a public servant, from his time as City Council member to now as U.S. Senator, he has worked tirelessly to improve the lives of the people he represents.

But this month Corey Stewart -- a right-wing Republican who espoused pro-Confederate, ultra conservative views during his failed gubernatorial primary -- announced he is running against Tim in 2018 and has already pledged to put all his money into a "very vicious and ruthless campaign."

We know that Tim will always fight for Virginians, but it seems Corey will only fight for himself and Donald Trump, using nasty attacks on Tim. **[Will you chip in to make sure Tim has the resources he needs to not only defend himself from attacks, but also talk about the progress we've made together?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Bjd0Vt5q%2FndMCQG5o4%2BjpYuTW4v1tULp)**

**In the Senate, Tim champions issues important to Virginia families: strengthening affordable health care, protecting education funding, and creating economic opportunity for all, among others.**

Tim is going to run this race like he's run all his campaigns: by talking about the issues and his work to improve the lives of all Virginians. But Stewart wants to sling mud and try to drag Tim down with him. **[We can't let that happen -- will you pitch in so that Tim can share his positive vision and accomplishments for Virginia?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=vHRoAFtHynkOsKpoG8kxe5ir6JtrUBlL)**

\-- Team Kaine
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=jZOsp823KZ3EVeovfT6Wh5ir6JtrUBlL)
---
| Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=C422lqKne6LMYME1OFdd0Zir6JtrUBlL).
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: mindy@dscc.org
subject: Elizabeth Warren, Kirsten Gillibrand, and Claire McCaskill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Senator Warren hit the nail on the head yesterday: With only 21 women serving in the Senate, we have to make sure that we're there for the TEN Democratic women up for re-election this cycle.
---
**[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warren-wsn?refcode=DPE-20170722-Myers-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Team,

Senator Warren hit the nail on the head this week:

**With only 21 women serving in the Senate, we have to make sure that we 're there for the TEN Democratic women up for re-election this cycle.**

That's why we're launching the 2018 Women's Senate Network. With your help, we'll be able to give our female Democratic senators the resources they need for the tough fights ahead -- and send them some reinforcements too!

[**Can we count on you to become a founding member of the Women 's Senate Network today? With a gift of $7 or more, we'll send you a "Nevertheless, She Persisted" magnet to thank you for standing with our Democratic women.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warren-wsn?refcode=DPE-20170722-Myers-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

We're grateful to say that Senator Catherine Cortez Masto -- who delivered a real blow to the GOP last November -- has agreed to take the helm of the 2018 Women's Senate Network to help our candidates launch strong campaigns.

And as Senator Warren's former campaign manager, I can tell you this: Never underestimate the amount of resources you need to win -- or the uniquely vicious attacks that will be thrown at our tough, female candidates.

By signing on to be a part of the Women's Senate Network, you'll be helping us re-elect women like:

* Elizabeth Warren, who hasn't stopped fighting the Trump administration's reckless policies for a moment -- not even when Mitch McConnell tried to silence her on the Senate floor for reading Coretta Scott King's letter.

* Kirsten Gillibrand, who led the charge in opposing Betsy DeVos and so many of Trump's disastrous Cabinet nominees.

* Claire McCaskill, who has held the GOP accountable every step of the way for failing to hold public hearings on their plans to repeal the Affordable Care Act -- and is being targeted by GOP ads for her efforts.

But just like Claire, our Democratic women's willingness to take on the tough fights has made them top targets in 2018.

In Michigan, Kid Rock is threatening to run against Debbie Stabenow. And in Wisconsin, Tammy Baldwin is already facing more than a million dollars in attack ads funded by a GOP mega-donor.

Nearly half of the women in the Senate face re-election next year, and if we want to keep them in Washington to fight for us, then we have to act now to give them the resources they'll need.

[**Chip in now to become a 2018 founding donor of the Women 's Senate Network and help build a community to support our women Senate candidates. And when you contribute $7 or more, you'll even get a "Nevertheless, She Persisted" magnet to thank you for your membership.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warren-wsn?refcode=DPE-20170722-Myers-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you for supporting our Democratic women,

Mindy
**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954db80/2b07114c/303a2a92/731172eb/454807844/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954db80/2b07114c/303a2a92/731172ea/454807844/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954db80/2b07114c/303a2a92/731172e5/454807844/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: We can't let Republicans turn this Senate seat red >>
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c64f6/24c69fd9/c4647e5a/1899e60f/1413059454/VEsH/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFC724N_digital_email_20170722_TammyBaldwinFR_inact&source=WQEFC724N_digital_email_20170722_TammyBaldwinFR_inact")
---

| | Peter,

In 2016, Trump turned Wisconsin red.

Next year, Tammy Baldwin is running for re-election there, and Republicans are already attacking her relentlessly. They're spending over a million dollars on ads against Tammy -- including radio ads that deliberately malign her pro-choice record.

Republicans might be pulling out all the stops, but guess what? We're not going to let them get away with it.

**[Donate $3 to support Tammy's re-election to the Senate, and 100% of your donation will go directly to her campaign.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c64f6/24c69fd9/c4647e5a/1899e608/1413059454/VEsE/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/tammy-baldwin?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+support+Tammys+reelection+to&utm_campaign=WQEFC724N_digital_email_20170722_TammyBaldwinFR_inact&source=WQEFC724N_digital_email_20170722_TammyBaldwinFR_inact")**

An out-of-state millionaire has already spent $3.5 million to support a GOP challenger who hasn't even announced he's running!

That's why we need to make sure we don't leave anything on the table.

We know who Tammy is, and we know who she fights for every day. We can thwart the negative attack ads against her with a strong show of support for the work she is doing every day -- from fighting to stop Trumpcare to defending Planned Parenthood in the most critical moments.

**We rely on Tammy to fight for the issues that matter, and she relies on us, as a community, to have her back. Donate $3 today, and 100% of your donation goes directly to her campaign:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Defend-Tammy-Baldwin](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c64f6/24c69fd9/c4647e5a/1899e609/1413059454/VEsF/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/tammy-baldwin?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgDefendTammyBaldw&utm_campaign=WQEFC724N_digital_email_20170722_TammyBaldwinFR_inact&source=WQEFC724N_digital_email_20170722_TammyBaldwinFR_inact")**

Thank you,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c64f6/24c69fd9/c4647e5a/1899e60a/1413059454/VEsC/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/tammy-baldwin?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFC724N_digital_email_20170722_TammyBaldwinFR_inact&source=WQEFC724N_digital_email_20170722_TammyBaldwinFR_inact")

|
---|---|---
[ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c64f6/24c69fd9/c4647e5a/1899e60b/1413059454/VEsD/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFC724N_digital_email_20170722_TammyBaldwinFR_inact&source=WQEFC724N_digital_email_20170722_TammyBaldwinFR_inact")
# Our candidates have the power of our five-million-person movement behind them. 100% of your donation will go directly to their campaigns.

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c64f6/24c69fd9/c4647e5a/1899e604/1413059454/VEsA/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQEFC724N_digital_email_20170722_TammyBaldwinFR_inact&source=WQEFC724N_digital_email_20170722_TammyBaldwinFR_inact") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c64f6/24c69fd9/c4647e5a/1899e605/1413059454/VEsB/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFC724N_digital_email_20170722_TammyBaldwinFR_inact&source=WQEFC724N_digital_email_20170722_TammyBaldwinFR_inact"). name: Democrats.org
subject: Add your name now - tell the GOP to back off!
body:
Help us save affordable care. **Add your name if you're still committed to fighting back against the GOP's health care repeal.

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Repeal1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170722_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170722_dnc2_nd")**

"https://my.democrats.org/No-Repeal1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+httpmydemocratsorgNoRepeal&utm_campaign=em_20170722_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170722_dnc2_nd")**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523165/4067b0a/3178d0426/7e6d3b39/419116226/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170722_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170722_dnc2_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523165/4067b0a/3178d0426/7e6d3ac6/419116226/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170722_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170722_dnc2_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523165/4067b0a/3178d0426/7e6d3ac4/419116226/VEsHBQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170722_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170722_dnc2_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: just-announced@dscc.org
subject: Your "Nevertheless, She Persisted" car magnet >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Get your limited-edition "Nevertheless, She Persisted" magnet and become a founding member of the Women's Senate Network today!
---
**[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warren-wsn?refcode=DPE-20170722-JustAnnounced_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Team --

How proud were you when you first heard these words about Elizabeth Warren?

"She was warned. She was given an explanation. Nevertheless, she persisted."
Mitch McConnell couldn't get her to stop speaking up for our values -- and now you can show the world when it comes to your values, you won't be silenced either!

[**Pitch in $7 or more today to become a founding member of the Women 's Senate Network and we'll send you a limited-edition "Nevertheless, She Persisted" magnet (shipping included!)**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warren-wsn?refcode=DPE-20170722-JustAnnounced_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warren-wsn?refcode=DPE-20170722-JustAnnounced_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Elizabeth is just one of the TEN Democratic female senators up for re-election this cycle. That's nearly HALF of all women in the Senate.

name: Team Van Hollen
subject: a government of laws
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
Here is the truth: we are living through a major test of our democratic institutions and we each have a critical role to play in ensuring that we remain "a government of laws, not of men" - as John Adams stated in 1780.

Just in the last few hours we have seen President Trump declare that he has the right to pardon crimes by members of his family, his staff, and even himself. Sadly, it's not even a shock that Trump thinks he is above the law and is willing to announce it to the world. It is appalling that Congressional Republicans have been silent in response to the fact that a sitting President, under investigation for potentially collaborating with a hostile foreign country to defraud our elections, feels he can absolve himself and his cronies of any wrongdoing. Silence is complicity.

_This is uncharted territory._

The far right wing in this country and the big money interests that feed them are willing to jeopardize the fundamental principles and values of America in the hope of advancing themselves and their narrow ideological agenda.

So America needs our help. Keeping the pressure on the Trump administration and every single Republican member of Congress is the only way we can protect this country from this threat to our democracy.

[**Can Chris count on you to keep up the fight? Add your name here.**](https://cvanhollen.bsd.net/page/m/2de91bc1/70cdc2ba/477a59c6/397c352/183674235/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-stand-with-chris-to-continue-the-investigation?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Can+Chris+count+on+you+to+keep+up+the+fi&utm_campaign=em072217&source=em072217")

It's up to all of us.

Best,
Team Van Hollen

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](https://cvanhollen.bsd.net/page/m/2de91bc1/70cdc2ba/477a59c6/397c353/183674235/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em072217&source=em072217") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.
